if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND c.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND c.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReviewComment :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rwt.code_label AS writer_type_cd_nm FROM pd_review_comment c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rwt ON cd_rwt.code_grp = 'REVIEW_WRITER_TYPE' AND cd_rwt.code_value = c.writer_type_cd WHERE c.review_comment_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReviewComment :: selectList */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rwt.code_label AS writer_type_cd_nm FROM pd_review_comment c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rwt ON cd_rwt.code_grp = 'REVIEW_WRITER_TYPE' AND cd_rwt.code_value = c.writer_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdReviewComment :: selectPageList */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rwt.code_label AS writer_type_cd_nm FROM pd_review_comment c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rwt ON cd_rwt.code_grp = 'REVIEW_WRITER_TYPE' AND cd_rwt.code_value = c.writer_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(c.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdReviewComment :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_review_comment c
